ogTitle: Wamuran Basin vs Wandal: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wamuran Basin and Wandal.
heading: Wamuran Basin vs Wandal — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wamuran Basin, Queensland and Wandal, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wandal has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Wamuran Basin (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wamuran Basin or Wandal safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wamuran Basin has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Wandal scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wamuran Basin scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Wandal scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wamuran Basin or Wandal?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wandal has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
